Off Calendar Aug-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling, which was uncontested, as follows: PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE CAPITAL, LLC's Motion For Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the (modified) Proposed Order and Proposed Judgment submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976
